zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Bromflete於1372年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾隆德斯波洛時，他的父親William de Bromflete43歲，母親Ellen de Yarnewek42歲。他於從1389年到1390年與Margaret Porter結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1430年12月31日在英國貝德福爾維明頓享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾維明頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Bromflete于1372年出生在英国英格兰越可爾隆德斯波洛时，他的父亲William de Bromflete43岁，母亲Ellen de Yarnewek42岁。他于从1389年到1390年与Margaret Porter结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1430年12月31日在英国貝德福爾維明頓享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾維明頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Bromflete was born in 1372, in Londesborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Bromflete, was 43 and his mother, Ellen de Yarnewek, was 42. He married Margaret Porter from 1389 to 1390. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 31 December 1430, in Wymington, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Wymington, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Bromflete est né en 1372, à Londesborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Bromflete, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Ellen de Yarnewek, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Porter du 1389 au 1390. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 31 décembre 1430, à Wymington, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Wymington, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat von 1389 bis 1390 Margaret Porter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 31. Lui sposato Margaret Porter da 1389 a 1390. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Bromfleteが1372年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアロンデスボロウで生まれた時，父William de Bromfleteは43歳，母Ellen de Yarnewekは42歳であった。から1389年まで1390年にMargaret Porterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1430年12月31日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアウイミントンで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアウイミントンにて埋葬された。

ko.Londesborough, Yorkshire East Riding, En: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 론데스버루그h
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Bromflete(이)가 1372년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 론데스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Bromflete(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen de Yarnewek(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1389년 부터 1390년 까지 Margaret Porter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1430년 12월 31일 영국 베드퍼드실르 윈이밍턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 윈이밍턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Bromflete nasceu em 1372, em Londesborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Bromflete, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Ellen de Yarnewek, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Porter de 1389 a 1390. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1430, em Wymington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Wymington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Londesborough, Yorkshire East Riding, En: лондесбороую, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Bromflete родился в 1372 г. в местности лондесбороую, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Bromflete было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen de Yarnewek, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Porter с 1389 по 1390. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 31 декабря 1430 г. в местности вимингтон, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности вимингтон, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Bromflete nació en 1372, en Londesborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Bromflete, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Ellen de Yarnewek, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Margaret Porter desde 1389 hasta 1390. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 31 de diciembre de 1430, en Wymington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Wymington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
